mapper.select: SELECT l.line_id, l.line_name, l.fleet_id, l.total_stations, d.name AS road_captain_name, f.fleet_name FROM line l LEFT JOIN driver d ON d.line_id = l.line_id AND d.is_road_captain = TRUE LEFT JOIN fleet f ON l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id WHERE l.line_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO line (line_name, fleet_id, total_stations) VALUES (#{lineName}, #{fleetId}, #{totalStations})
mapper.select:
SELECT l.line_id, l.line_name, l.fleet_id, l.total_stations, d.name AS road_captain_name, f.fleet_name FROM line l LEFT JOIN driver d ON d.line_id = l.line_id AND d.is_road_captain = TRUE LEFT JOIN fleet f ON l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id
AND l.line_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lineName}, '%')
AND l.fleet_id = #{fleetId}
ORDER BY l.line_id ASC

SELECT l.line_id, l.line_name, l.fleet_id, l.total_stations, d.name AS road_captain_name, f.fleet_name FROM line l LEFT JOIN driver d ON d.line_id = l.line_id AND d.is_road_captain = TRUE LEFT JOIN fleet f ON l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id ORDER BY l.line_id ASC

SELECT l.line_id, l.line_name, l.fleet_id, l.total_stations, d.name AS road_captain_name, f.fleet_name FROM line l LEFT JOIN driver d ON d.line_id = l.line_id AND d.is_road_captain = TRUE LEFT JOIN fleet f ON l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id WHERE l.fleet_id = #{fleetId}
